subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Va'sh-Shams (Commentary on the Surih of the Sun)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath set the dove of eloquence, perched among the twigs of the tree of explanation, to weaving her divers melodies
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انطق ورقاء البیان علی افنان دوحه التبیان بفنون الالحان علی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @limits of language, @names and attributes of God, @outward and inward meanings, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God
